channel.title: Organizational Culture on RaihnForge
channel.description: Recent content in Organizational Culture on RaihnForge

item.title: Operational Leadership Considerations: Culture, Diversity, and the Top 50
item.description:
Company Culture: Bungie

Having close friends that work at the organization and having conducted an informational interview, I was interested in taking a closer look at the organizational culture. Bungie’s values are known and adhered to by employees largely. As I assess the list of values, I find them interesting and atypical compared to other organizations: teams are stronger than heroes, player experience first, strong ideas loosely held, closing is an everyday practice, widen your perspective, keep it fun, put a dent in the universe (Comparably, 2021).
